# TikTok Shop API: Get Shop Product Performance Detail

# Shop Product Performance Detail API Guide

## 1. Purpose
API retrieve performance metrics for specific product. Use to track sales, GMV, orders over time.

## 2. Endpoint
*   **Method**: `GET`
*   **Path**: `/analytics/202509/shop_products/{product_id}/performance`
*   **Base URL**: `https://open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com`

## 3. Headers & Auth
*   `content-type`: `application/json`
*
